APPEARANCES:
Arturo E. Sandoval and Abigail P. Adams of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendant / moving party RPI Company
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties F. Lee Lawrence and Mary Ann Lawrence

RULING:
DEFENDANT RPI COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFFS F. LEE LAWRENCE AND MARY ANN LAWRENCE TO APPEAR AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION

Hearing held. The Court ordered continued Defendant RPI Company's motion to compel Plaintiffs F. Lee Lawrence and Mary Ann Lawrence to appear and testify at deposition to July 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. Defendant's supplemental brief due by 7/7 and plaintiff's supplemental reply due by 7/10. Both briefs are not to exceed 5 pages. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
